name: Asparagus Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Asparagus, diagonally sliced into 1-inch pieces
1 Vegetable, beef or chicken bouillion cube
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute vegetables in butter for 5 minutes.
2. Add water and bouillion cube; simmer for 5 minutes.
3. Add remaining ingredients and simmer for 10 more minutes.
4. Serve.
